{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322041523BD9C6D586F127426EE7D"}"},"total":327},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7523270692359258904","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我只能说最爽的一集，比起女娲后土这种，还是元凤更适合当女主，也更爽，因为个人来讲女娲和后土更多的是尊敬，其次本书是站里少之又少的，在龙凤甚至凶兽量劫前的书，真的是相当不错啊😋，爽吃"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751667967,"group_id":"7509179605895367705","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"78813501072"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7509179605895367705","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"88"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4957,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":497},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7523071462578193176","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"设定很合理，除了最开始的一些设定比如大道有私心这种有点掉逼格的设定（虽然是能自圆其说）但其他设定都很好，鸿钧的总算不是无脑黑了，有点回到早期洪荒文的一些感觉，整体还是不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751603199,"group_id":"7509179605895367705","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"较为专业的ai文鉴定户","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzynIrcMmPsAmJyzhqzI8zg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f7af965837124adf9e7c06be55852d13~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702277&x-signature=y9TMmzz7fe9e6MdS0eLIC4NBmxE%3D","user_id":"78813501072","user_name":"鸽明"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"78813501072","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7509179605895367705","book_info":{"abstract":"一缕魂灵穿越至洪荒，成为极品先天灵根——梧桐树。
根脚非凡，不弱于先天神圣，又有元凤相济相生。
但奈何极品先天灵根诞生灵智已是不易，化形为大道所不容。
就在青梧化形时要被大道降下雷劫磨灭灵智之时，元凤以自身气运相互，为其担保，得以成功化形。
此后，欠下元凤天大因果，与之彻底绑定。
作为无系统、无外挂人士，争霸洪荒、拳打鸿钧、脚踩三清是不敢想。
